ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer resides */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" TEXT /* Loyalty program ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product purchased */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data is being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer data is valid */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate customer data */,
  "validation_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the validation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_validation_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_ranking" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who prefers the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_order" INTEGER /* Ordinal rank of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_ranking_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_ranking" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who prefers the gender-specific campaign */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender targeted in the campaign */,
  "gender_order" INTEGER /* Ordinal rank of the gender preference */,
  "gender_preference" TEXT /* Gender preference of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_ranking_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residence_ranking" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who prefers the region-specific campaign */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region targeted in the campaign */,
  "residence_order" INTEGER /* Ordinal rank of the residence preference */,
  "region_preference" TEXT /* Region preference of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residence_ranking_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residence_ranking_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "promotion_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage or amount offered in the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data is being accessed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing analyst accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the marketing analyst accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the marketing analyst to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
